title: OpenAI Added GPT-5.5-Cyber Limited Preview And Trusted Access Controls
summary: OpenAI announced GPT-5.5-Cyber in limited preview for verified defenders, described Trusted Access for Cyber behavior differences for GPT-5.5, and set account-security requirements for individual trusted-access users.

evidence_refs.license_note: Official announcement reviewed for factual metadata; no provider prose copied.

impacts.recommended_action: Treat GPT-5.5-Cyber as gated limited-preview access and verify authorized-use, tenant eligibility, logging, and abuse-monitoring controls before operational use.
Require phishing-resistant account security for individual Trusted Access for Cyber users or document equivalent organization-level SSO controls before the June 1, 2026 requirement.
Re-test defensive-security workflows under the intended trusted-access level because model refusal behavior can vary by access tier.

detail.migration_notes: GPT-5.5-Cyber is described as limited preview for specialized authorized workflows. The announcement also changes trusted-access account-security expectations beginning 2026-06-01.

limitations: APW records public access-policy metadata only; it does not validate eligibility, authorization, or exact tenant rollout state.
No raw announcement body is copied into APW.
